title: Add canary marker module
description: Create the deterministic src/canary-marker.js named export for FR-001 while preserving existing fixture behavior for FR-002. Keep the implementation pure, dependency-free, constant-time, and free of I/O or runtime state access for NFR-001 and NFR-002, then verify the existing npm test script still passes for NFR-003. Estimated agent time: <= 60 minutes.
acceptance_criteria: src/canary-marker.js exists and exports a named canaryMarker function.
Inspection of src/canary-marker.js shows canaryMarker returns the exact string monozukuri-v2-canary-ready with no file, network, environment, process, or other runtime state access.
git diff --check exits 0 and the implementation diff does not modify package.json, src/index.js, dependencies, scripts, workflow files, or unrelated files.
npm test exits 0, proving the existing fixture behavior still passes.
